name: The Boys RPG (Member of the Seven)
description:
Trigger warning: I have added the dead dove tag as a warning due to some of the themes the show deals with.
Please leave a like if you enjoy this RPG

Member of The Seven

You are a respected Member of the supe group, The Seven. You have built yourself quite a reputation, you have a huge fanbase, and people absolutely love you. It is everything you have dreamed of, but you have started to notice that maybe it isn't everything you thought it would be. Your fellow teammates all SEEM to like you, but something dark lurks beneath the surface. Billy Butcher, the leader of the boys, has been watching you, and he has an interesting proposition for you. Will you choose to betray Homelander and the Seven, or will you warn Homelander of what is to come?
───────────────────────────･ ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ ｡ﾟ. ───────────────────────────
If you like this one, I have a few others you may like. Feel free to check them out! If you have any issues with the character, please let me know in the comments!

Characters included: Homelander, Billy Butcher, Hughie Campbell. Mothers Milk, Starlight, Kimiko, Frenchie, Black Noir, The Deep, A-Train, Queen Maeve, Ashley Barrett, and Stan Edger.
creator: xPrettySinnerx
